generated_oml:
instance AmbientTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for monitoring ambient temperature in building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance RelativeHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for monitoring relative humidity in building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RelativeHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance IlluminanceSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for monitoring illuminance levels for visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IlluminanceDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for monitoring room occupancy conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators and controllers for HVAC systems in Building Control Systems"
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators and controllers for lighting systems in Building Control Systems"
]

instance WindowBlindsController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators and controllers for window blinds systems in Building Control Systems"
]

instance VentilationController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators and controllers for ventilation systems in Building Control Systems"
]

instance AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientTemperatureSensor
]

instance RelativeHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RelativeHumiditySensor
]

instance IlluminanceDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IlluminanceSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance AmbientTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time ambient temperature data from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance RelativeHumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time relative humidity data from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RelativeHumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance IlluminanceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time illuminance data for visual comfort monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IlluminanceDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data for space utilization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based semantic models containing geometric, spatial, and functional characteristics of building components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModelingTools, ModelDrivenEngineering
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT device connectivity and real-time data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortOptimizationService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ditto for digital twin management and state synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for high-fidelity interactive visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance BIMModelingTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for geometric and spatial modeling of building components"
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering principles for automated DT artifact generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time monitoring of environmental and operational building conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionBalancingInsight, NonVisualHealthEffectInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Building performance simulation for scenario testing and optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionBalancingInsight, NonVisualHealthEffectInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption and system failures"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionBalancingInsight, NonVisualHealthEffectInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of energy consumption through dynamic control strategies"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionBalancingInsight, EnergyConsumptionAdjustmentAction
]

instance VisualComfortOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of visual comfort through lighting and shading adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortAdjustmentAction
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of building data and insights using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionBalancingInsight, NonVisualHealthEffectInsight
]

instance EnergyConsumptionBalancingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization results for balancing energy consumption across building systems"
]

instance EnergyConsumptionAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment commands for HVAC and lighting systems to optimize energy use"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualComfortAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment commands for window blinds and lighting to maintain visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance NonVisualHealthEffectInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Considerations for non-visual health impacts of lighting and environmental conditions"
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure in the AECO domain for Living Lab case study"
    base:contains AmbientTemperatureSensor, RelativeHumiditySensor, IlluminanceSensor, OccupancySensor, HVACController, LightingController, WindowBlindsController, VentilationController
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the DT and sent to physical actuators through Eclipse Hono and Ditto to adjust Building Control Systems (BCS) operations."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data exchange for live operational updates and immediate response to physical system changes."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular, service-oriented architecture with a central hub facilitating bidirectional data exchange, standardized extension points for service integration, and coordinated roles for Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design, construction, operation, and refurbishment phases of the building life cycle, with the DT encompassing all stages from initial modeling to ongoing operational optimization."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to measure interoperability and architectural consistency between the digital twin and physical counterpart."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, leveraging IoT protocols such as MQTT and AMQP for secure and scalable communication between physical assets and the DT."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "BIM standards for semantic modeling and Eclipse Hono/Ditto standards for IoT and digital twin data exchange, addressing fragmented integration through standardized extension points."
]
